name: ai-furniture-hub
description: MCP server for AI agents: 300 curated products across 31 categories (furniture, appliances, PC, smart home, beauty, gadgets). mm-precision search, related-item chains, shelf+storage coordination, Rakuten API live, Amazon+Rakuten affiliate.

RAKUTEN_API_MOCK.description: Set to 'false' for live Rakuten API

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search 300 curated products by dimensions (mm), price, color, category. 31 categories.

tools.name: get_product_detail
tools.description: Full specs by product ID with related-item hints.

tools.name: search_rakuten_products
tools.description: Real-time Rakuten Ichiba search with affiliate URLs.

tools.name: search_amazon_products
tools.description: Amazon affiliate URL with category-specific SearchIndex.

tools.name: coordinate_storage
tools.description: Shelf + storage box set proposals with quantity per tier.

tools.name: suggest_by_space
tools.description: Space dimensions -> products that fit, grouped by category.

tools.name: identify_product
tools.description: Photo features -> model number, specs, compatible storage.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Browse all 31 product categories with counts.

tools.name: get_popular_products
tools.description: Popular products by category/brand with Rakuten trending.

tools.name: get_related_items
tools.description: Related-item chain: required accessories, protection, add-ons. 1 product -> 3-5 items.
